event: Two figures in a wilderness mountain setting
description: A photograph of two people in a rugged, forested mountain landscape. At left, a tall figure stands wrapped in a long grey cloak or blanket on a large rock. At right, another figure sits on rocks amid autumn-colored vegetation, wearing colorful or patterned clothing. Pine trees with golden autumn foliage rise behind them. The rocky terrain is rough and uneven. The light is natural and diffuse.
